verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise You praise You praise You Let my life praise You Praise You praise You praise You Let my life O Lord praise You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I come to You today With a simple prayer to pray In everything I do Let my life O Lord praise You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord You formed me out of clay For Your glory I was made Use this vessel as You choose Let my life O Lord praise You
